description: 2 Vietnamese War By ARTURO F GONZALEZ PLEIKU South Vietnam NANAThe savage Vietnam ese war is a story told not in the communiques of major battles but in countless perscnal reminiscences too small and insignificant to get imto official print but revealing nevertheless as to the stealth ingenuity and brutality with which this strug gle 1 being waged by both sides Flag Vs Flag Take the case of the village znd the flag For a number of weeks villagers in a pla tezu province had awakened to find a Viet Con raised flag always flying over them Put up by treeclimbing guerril las each night il was duti fully hauled down each day by American advisors Finally a resourceful Ameri can sergeant cleverly stripped a piece of bamboo filled it with plasiic explosive attached a detorator and trip wires and wove the bamboo secretly into the irees upper branches Laie that night the village echoed to an explosion and the townspeople ultimately found a few limbs and a hand clutching a piece of cloth little more The only flag now flyin over the itown 1s the gold and red striped flag of South Vietnam Bullet Booby Trap The newest development
